### Target
- Which registry item does this attack? (`OP-n` / `GC-n` / `Hn` / `A-n` / a named `HYP-*`, or "new")

### The claim / result
<!-- State it precisely, with the mathematics or the data, and its epistemic tag. -->

### Anti-crank checklist (required)
- [ ] Every nontrivial claim carries exactly one epistemic tag.
- [ ] No fabricated citation, number, theorem, or arXiv ID — every reference web-verified.
- [ ] Red-teamed against the relevant no-go theorems and this wiki's own closures.
- [ ] Stable IDs preserved; any new item takes the next free ID; change is logged in CHANGELOG.md.
